name: Chow Mien on a Bun
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain bean sprouts.
2. Rinse, drain, and slice water chestnuts.
3. Split and toast hamburger buns.
4. Cook meat and onion in a large skillet until onion is tender; remove excess fat.
5. Mix water, cornstarch, soy sauce, molasses, and ginger; stir into meat mixture.
6. Add bean sprouts and water chestnuts; cook, stirring constantly, until thickened and boiling (about 5 minutes).
7. Serve on toasted buns; pass soy sauce.
NOTE:
For Chow Mien, omit the buns. Serve chow mien mixture over hot cooked rice or noodles.
